q.en: Whose enchanted books transport Miguel into the stories he reads?
q.zh: 是谁的魔法书把米格尔传送进他所读的故事里？

options.en: A librarian according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一位图书管理员（按书中另一种说法）
他的曾祖父乔治，'伟大的加拉尔多'

explain.en: Miguel discovered a chest of enchanted books that belonged to his great-grandpa George, a magician called The Great Gallardo.
explain.zh: 米格尔发现了一箱魔法书，属于他的曾祖父乔治——一位名叫'伟大的加拉尔多'的魔术师。

q.en: Which book does Miguel read to enter the adventure on Jackson's Island?
q.zh: 米格尔读了哪本书，从而进入杰克逊岛的冒险？

options.en: The Jungle Book according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 《丛林之书》（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Miguel grabbed The Adventures of Tom Sawyer and was pulled into Tom's pirate adventure.
explain.zh: 米格尔拿起《汤姆·索亚历险记》，被拉进了汤姆的海盗冒险中。

q.en: What character from the story does Miguel become?
q.zh: 米格尔在故事中变成了哪个角色？

explain.en: Miguel opens his eyes to find himself sailing down a river as Huck Finn.
explain.zh: 米格尔睁开眼，发现自己正作为哈克·芬在河上划船。

q.en: How many gold coins do the boys find on the raft?
q.zh: 男孩们在木筏上发现了多少枚金币？

explain.en: Tom held up a leather sack; inside were twenty gold coins.
explain.zh: 汤姆举起一个皮袋，里面是二十枚金币。

q.en: What does the word 'enchanted' (as in enchanted books) mean in the story?
q.zh: 故事中'enchanted'（魔法的）一词是什么意思？

explain.en: The books are magical—reading a passage transports Miguel into the story.
explain.zh: 这些书是有魔力的——读一段文字就会把米格尔传进故事里。

q.en: The book describes the words on the page as 'dancing around' and appearing 'like it was in three dimensions.' What does this show?
q.zh: 书中描写书页上的文字'舞动起来'，并'像三维立体一样'。这表现了什么？

options.en: The magical, lifelike quality of the enchanted book
options.zh: 魔法书栩栩如生、充满魔力的特质

options.en: That Miguel cannot read according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 米格尔不识字（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: That it is a math book

explain.en: These descriptions help readers feel the book's magic as Miguel is pulled into the story.
explain.zh: 这些描写让读者感受到魔法书的神奇，体会米格尔被拉进故事的过程。

q.en: How does Tom get rid of the real pirates who come looking for their raft?
q.zh: 汤姆是如何摆脱前来寻找木筏的真海盗的？

options.en: He fights them with swords according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他用剑与他们搏斗（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: He tricks them into covering themselves in white sand to 'cure' the itch
options.zh: 他把他们骗去用白沙裹住身体来'治疗'瘙痒

explain.en: Tom convinces the pirates that white sand hardened by the sun will cure 'mosquito fever,' so they sail away coated in sand.
explain.zh: 汤姆骗海盗说被太阳晒硬的白沙能治'蚊子热'，于是海盗满身白沙地驾筏离开了。

q.en: When Miguel returns to the loft, how much real time has passed?
q.zh: 当米格尔回到阁楼时，现实中过去了多少时间？

options.en: The whole summer according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 整个夏天（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Miguel looked at his watch and realized only minutes had passed since he came up to the loft.
explain.zh: 米格尔看了手表，意识到自己上阁楼后只过去了短短几分钟。

q.en: Why does Miguel tell Tom Sawyer that Aunt Polly loves him and he should appreciate what he has?
q.zh: 米格尔为何告诉汤姆·索亚，波莉姨妈爱他，他应珍惜自己所拥有的？

options.en: To keep the story true to the book and remind Tom of his family's love
options.zh: 为了让故事符合原书，并提醒汤姆家人对他的爱

options.en: Because he wants to be a pirate according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 因为他想当海盗（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: Miguel wanted to 'save The Adventures of Tom Sawyer' and show Tom the value of family.
explain.zh: 米格尔想'拯救《汤姆·索亚历险记》'，并让汤姆明白家庭的可贵。

q.en: What main message does the story give about adventure and home?
q.zh: 这个故事关于冒险与家，传达了什么主要信息？

options.en: Adventure is exciting, but family and home matter too
options.zh: 冒险令人兴奋，但家庭与家同样重要

options.en: Home is boring and should be forgotten according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 家很无聊，应该被遗忘（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Although being a pirate was exciting, Miguel was happy to be home with his family.
explain.zh: 尽管当海盗很刺激，米格尔还是高兴地回到了家人身边。

prompt.en: If you found a magical book that could transport you into any story, which book would you choose and what character would you become? Write 4-5 sentences.
prompt.zh: 如果你发现一本能把你传进任何故事的魔法书，你会选哪本书、变成哪个角色？写4到5句话。

en: Name the book and the character you would become.
Describe one adventure you would have.
Explain why you chose that story.
zh: 说出书名以及你会变成的角色。
描述你会经历的一场冒险。
解释你为什么选这个故事。
